source_title: Transcriptional regulation of GAD1 GABA synthesis gene in the prefrontal cortex of subjects with schizophrenia.
selection_note: Pre-cutoff schizophrenia cortex literature keeps GAD1 as a core inhibitory-synapse rescue candidate.

source_title: Downregulation of parvalbumin at cortical GABA synapses reduces network gamma oscillatory activity.
selection_note: Parvalbumin interneuron dysfunction is a canonical pre-cutoff rescue signal for inhibitory synapse integrity.

source_title: Reelin Signaling and Synaptic Plasticity in Schizophrenia.
selection_note: Reelin remains a pre-cutoff bridge between interneuron signaling and synaptic plasticity in schizophrenia.

source_title: Cross-platform validation of neurotransmitter release impairments in schizophrenia patient-derived NRXN1-mutant neurons.
selection_note: Patient-derived NRXN1-mutant neuron data gives a direct pre-cutoff synaptic transmission anchor.

source_title: Synaptic deficits in iPSC-derived cortical interneurons in schizophrenia are mediated by NLGN2 and rescued by N-acetylcysteine.
selection_note: NLGN2 is the most direct pre-cutoff interneuron synapse rescue anchor in the checked-in literature set.
